rulings.Case Title: HOWARD L. WESTON, AS TRUSTEE OF THE HOWARD L. VS. TOMMY K ABIB et al
rulings.Rulings: HOUSING COURT LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR FOR WEDNESDAY, APRIL 16, 2014. Line 7. DEFENDANT SAID SAOUAF, TOMMY ABIB and IMANE AKHBIRIQ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled in part and sustained in part. Motion is sustained with leave to amend as to Defendants Tommy Abib and Said Saouaf to properly allege service of "3 Day Notice". Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to allege compliance with Rent Ordinance. Defendants cite no authority for the proposition that the complete text of just cause has to be included in the "3 Day Notice." =(501/REQ)
